title: Quality Result
description: Phase 3 Quality Gate output for an Engine Run. Aggregates the Quality Gate checks into a single status the Repair Pipeline can act on. ADR 0013 deferred this schema until Sprint 3+; ADR 0017 + Sprint 3C-lite ship it now to close the contract gap. The shape mirrors packages.generation.quality_gate.QualityResult; tests/test_artefact_schema_3c_lite.py locks the two against drift (top-level + nested $defs).

status.description: Aggregate status across checks. Warning-severity findings are reported in checks[] but do not lower the top-level status.

checks.description: Per-check results in the order Quality Gate ran them. Future sprints may extend the enum without breaking the schema's array-of-CheckResult shape.

summary.description: Short one-line operator summary that trace.ndjson can surface without rendering the full check list.

critic.description: Quality Critic lane (warning only; NEVER feeds the top-level status). Null unless the caller passed the blueprint into run_quality_gate. kor-4a deterministic heuristics (source deterministic-v0); kor-4b merges read-only verifierModel taste findings on top (source verifierModel / mock-no-key / mock-llm-error). Mirrors packages.generation.quality_gate.CriticResult.

score.description: Weighted-by-severity score: max(0, 100 - sum(weight(severity))) with high=20, medium=10, low=5. 100 = clean blueprint.

issues.description: Repairable findings. Empty when the blueprint passed all heuristics and the verifier found no smells.

source.description: Provenance. deterministic-v0 = kor-4a heuristics only. kor-4b verifierModel critic adds: verifierModel (LLM findings merged on top of the heuristics), mock-no-key / mock-llm-error (verifier requested but fell back to the heuristic findings only - same findings as kor-4a).

criticIssue.description: One critic finding (deterministic heuristic or verifierModel taste finding). Mirrors packages.generation.quality_gate.CriticIssue.

severity.description: Drives the score penalty (high=20, medium=10, low=5).

type.description: Finding kind. generic_copy/thin_offer/placeholder_leakage/missing_local_context/missing_cta come from the kor-4a deterministic heuristics; fake_or_ungrounded_trust/weak_hero/too_template_like are kor-4b verifierModel taste findings (and a refined generic_copy). Adding a type requires bumping this enum and the CriticIssueType Literal together.

target.description: Address contract <route>.<section> (or global.<section> for brief-level fields).

repairHint.description: Deterministic suggestion for kor-5 / an operator. Advice, never an applied change.

name.description: Canonical check name. Locked by ADR 0015; adding a name here requires bumping the schema and the QualityResult Pydantic Literal at the same time.

status.description: Per-check status. skipped means the check could not run (e.g. typecheck without node_modules); not a substitute for failed.

severity.description: Aggregate severity. Existing artefacts omit this and default to blocking; warning findings stay non-blocking.

detail.description: Short human-readable summary for operators reading quality-result.json.

findings.description: Specific issues (missing routes, tsc errors, forbidden file paths). Repair Pipeline filters these against the Fix Registry to dispatch mechanical fixes.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration the check took. Zero for skipped checks.
